creator: gahr@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'm willing to bring in the new wxgtk30 port but I don't
have the time to track the removal or update of wxgtk29, mainly because
of ports depending from it. So, I guess I'll start by adding 30 - which
I also need for a port - and wait for fjoe@ to kill 20 :)

-- 
Pietro Cerutti
The FreeBSD Project
gahr@FreeBSD.org

PGP Public Key:
http://gahr.ch/pgp
